title: MISSING VARIANT: LOKI LAUFEYSON
content: Variant Loki Laufeyson detained after escaping with the Space Stone. Last seen on a deployed mission to Haven Hills, Alabama (2050) with Agent Mobius M. Mobius and Hunter-B15.

title: WANTED: UNKNOWN LOKI VARIANT
content: A Unknown Loki Variant is still at large after creating various Nexus Events, and killing a number of TVA hunters.
